first_paragraph: The **women's 100 metre breaststroke** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 25 with the preliminary round and the semifinals and July 26 with the final.

The **women's 100 metre breaststroke** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 25 with the preliminary round and the semifinals and July 26 with the final.
